_note: Column map for the Titan/Apex industrial & retail quotation tables: | Item # | Item Description | Material | Height (cm) | Width (cm) | Weight (kg) |. Dimensions are in CENTIMETRES (unitScale: 10 → mm). The table has only two spatial dimensions; 'dimensionP' (depth) is omitted, so the assembler derives it from mass ÷ (category density × face area). No product-code or quantity column: 'code' points at the description (so categoryPatterns match item text) and quantity defaults to 1 per row. categoryPatterns are tested in order against the description; first match wins, else defaultCategory. Fragility is handled separately in Stage 2. For the legacy Arredo3 format (explicit L/H/P in mm, code column) set unitScale:1 and map all three dimension columns.
